acceptance_answers.how_authorization_is_revoked: AUTHORIZED transitions to REVOKED after revocation trigger or incident; connector is blocked, approval authority is invalidated for the affected scope, audit record is written, and future authorization requires a new UNDER_REVIEW cycle.
acceptance_answers.how_connector_moves_from_open_to_authori: OPEN -> UNDER_REVIEW with evidence package and audit record; UNDER_REVIEW -> APPROVED with USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 approvals plus hashes and rationales; APPROVED -> AUTHORIZED only with activation scope, fresh approval evidence, credential authority, audit evidence, rollback plan, and fail-closed tests.

emergency_suspension_workflow: Block connector execution and activation immediately.
Require review to determine REVOKED, UNDER_REVIEW, or APPROVED state.
generated_pr_body:
## PURPOSE
PB-102 defines the governance approval workflow that moves a connector from OPEN to AUTHORIZED without bypassing USBAY governance.

## RISK
If approval states and transitions are ambiguous, a connector could be treated as authorized without required reviewers, approval evidence, audit records, or revocation controls.

## POLICY LINK
AGENTS.md fail-closed, audit-first engineering, human oversight, rollback and forensics, trust-state isolation, and secret/data hygiene rules. PB-101 governance portfolio review and connector approval registers PB-050, PB-060, PB-070, PB-080, PB-090, and PB-100.

## REQUIRED APPROVALS
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 are mandatory before a connector may move from UNDER_REVIEW to APPROVED and before APPROVED can move to AUTHORIZED.

## GOVERNANCE CHECKS
JSON evidence must parse. State definitions, transition definitions, required approvers, approval evidence, fail-closed blockers, revocation workflow, emergency suspension workflow, and acceptance answers must validate.

## AUDIT
PB-102 generates governance/evidence/pb102/governance_approval_workflow.json, governance_approval_workflow_summary.md, generated_commit_title.txt, generated_pr_title.txt, and generated_pr_body.md.

## IMPACT
USBAY gains a reusable approval state machine for all connector programs while preserving fail-closed authorization blocking when evidence or approvals are incomplete.

## Decision
VERIFIED

## Status
READY_FOR_REVIEW
revocation_workflow: Receive revocation trigger or incident signal.
Invalidate approval authority for affected scope.
Require updated evidence and UNDER_REVIEW transition before any future authorization.

state_definitions.APPROVED: Required authorities approved evidence, but production activation is not yet authorized.
state_definitions.AUTHORIZED: Connector may proceed only within approved scope and after activation evidence exists.
state_definitions.OPEN: Connector review package exists but formal review is not complete.
state_definitions.REJECTED: Required authorities rejected the evidence or scope.
state_definitions.REVOKED: Previous authorization was withdrawn and connector must remain blocked.
state_definitions.SUSPENDED: Connector is temporarily blocked due incident, uncertainty, stale evidence, or emergency control.

title: Governance Approval Workflow
